narrative:
New Albany-G (precinct in Franklin County) has 859 registered voters, with 58.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a clear Republican lean of 7.5 percentage points.
